checks.name: Dockerfile has 4 mentions per direct lib require

blocking: DOM-25: libs/atlas-packet/npc/clientbound/remove_controller.go:43 hardcodes client dispatcher flag byte (w.WriteByte(0)) instead of resolving via tenant writer-options table
EXT-02: services/atlas-monsters/atlas.com/monsters/character/buff/ has zero test files (no httptest coverage of GetByCharacterId unmarshal)

EXT-03: no errors.Is(err, requests.ErrNotFound) distinction in map/ or character/buff/ of atlas-monsters — 404 and transient failures both silently degrade the same way in RelinquishControlOnHide/RestoreCandidacyOnReveal
nonBlocking: DOM-20: new test files across both services use individual Test funcs rather than table-driven tests := []struct{...} pattern

DOM-28-adjacent: location-lookup failure in RelinquishControlOnHide/RestoreCandidacyOnReveal logs at Debugf not Warnf, no degrade metric, though explicitly documented as deliberate (FR-7.2) with a reconciliation-sweep backstop
character/buff (atlas-monsters) technically triggers the Phase-2 'has model.go -> domain package' classification but is builder/entity-less by design (REST-client projection, no DB)
